title: TREE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: FARM SERVICE AGENCY TREE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance to replant or rehabilitate eligible trees, bushes, and vines lost by natural disasters. No disaster declaration is required. 1400 Independence Avenue SW Stop 0506 Washington, DC 205200506 Eligibility: Orchardists and nursery tree growers who have experienced a 15% unpreventable loss of a stand of trees, bushes, or vines due to a natural disaster. Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Not applicable Services: Disaster Related Cash Grants If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FARM SERVICE AGENCY
